ext_reminder_desc: Shows upcoming reminders and allows quick management.
ext_reminder_parse_err: [REMINDER] ❌ I can't interpret '{when}'. Try: 'tomorrow at 15', 'in 30 minutes', 'every Monday at 9'.
ext_reminder_limit_err: [REMINDER] ❌ Maximum limit of active reminders reached (50).
ext_reminder_set_error: ⚠️ Reminder saved but not scheduled (scheduler off).
